title: Otha Paarvaiyil Lyrics Kadamban
stanzas:
hey Otha paarvaiyil
yaendi enna nee
padam potu kattura.

moththa aasaiyum oru sera
unn kaekkuthe parimaara
buththi maaruthe
pozhuthellaam.
malaiyera.

Otha paarvaiyil
yaendi enna nee
padam potu kattura.

oore paakka
poren unna thookka.
kaaththum poovum kooda
kannil paakkaama
kaalam pooraa unna
kadhal seiven kaekaama

yedhedho yemaathura
en nenja paazhaakkura
aagaatha pechcha pesi
aala soodethura
mmm

Otha paarvaiyil
paarvaiyil
padam potu kattura.
koththu saaviyaa
saaviyaa
idupporam maattura

Vaasal .. thaandi..
vaaren una vendi.
yen vaazhka pooraa
unna serndhaa podhaathu
vazhve neeyaa maara
kodi jenmam theeraathe

aiyaiyyo un pechula
aagaayam en kaiyila
yaeththaatha enna
neeyum aasa pallaakkula.

hey Otha paarvaiyil
 enna yaendi
padam potu kattura.

moththa aasaiyum oru sera
unn kaekkuthe porai yeara
buththi maaruthe
pozhuthellaam.
veriyaera....

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Otha Paarvaiyil, the lyrics express deep feelings of love and yearning, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the characters in Kadamban. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt vocals create a romantic atmosphere, making it perfect for intimate moments. It conveys the essence of longing and connection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. The combination of Sri Madhumitha and Yuvan's voices adds a unique charm, making this track memorable.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Otha Paarvaiyil from the movie Kadamban is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Sri Madhumitha and Yuvan, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The unique collaboration between the singers and Yuvan's soulful composition makes it a must-listen for all Tamil music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, why are you showing your face to me?
My heart is lifted like a kite, it won't change my pain.
All my desires are asking for you, my mind won't change at any time. Oh, dear.
Hey, why are you showing your face to me?
My heart is lifted like a kite, it won't change my pain.
I will go to see the town, pulling you along. Even the flowers won't be seen in my eyes, I will love you without asking.
Something is troubling my heart, it feels like a rotten fruit. Talking nonsense, it keeps spinning around.
Hey, showing your face to me, my heart is lifted like a kite, it won't change my pain.
I will cross the threshold for you. My life won't be complete without you, don't change your path, don't let this life end.
Oh, your words are like the sky, I can't catch them in my hands, you too are like a wish on a palanquin.
Hey, why are you showing your face to me?
My heart is lifted like a kite, it won't change my pain.
All my desires are asking for you, my mind won't change at any time. Oh, dear.
